config.title: Komunikaty systemu
config.script:
#include "50518"
function fopen dim bFound:bFound=false dim pagestack for each pagestack in doc_ if not pagestack.gettoppage is nothing then if pagestack.gettoppage.iid = MY_IID then bFound=true end if end if next doc_.postcommand("varCmd=CMD_REFRESH vn5040=MY_IID") fopen = not bFound end function
function frefresh dim idError, idHelp,strDescription do while doc_.getnewmessage(idError,idHelp,strDescription) on_new_error_internal idError, idHelp,strDescription loop doc_.clearnewmessage dim pBody: set pBody = page_.ctrl(CTRLID_MSGTABLE).body 'usuń nadmiarowe elementy do while pBody.count > MAX_MESSAGES_ON_PAGE pBody.remove pBody.row( MAX_MESSAGES_ON_PAGE + 1 ).ident loop kill_timer set_timer display_nx_trace end function
private sub display_nx_trace if trans_.isvar(COMMON_VAR_UISTYLE) then 'trans_.message 1002 , 0 , "COMMON_VAR_UISTYLE " + cstr(clng(trans_.var(COMMON_VAR_UISTYLE))) if clng(trans_.var(COMMON_VAR_UISTYLE)) <> clng(1) then exit sub end if else 'trans_.message 1002 , 0 , "no COMMON_VAR_UISTYLE " end if
if nx_.trace.highest_error_class > 0 then
dim oRootTraceStream : set oRootTraceStream = doc_.createstreamobj() dim oNXStream : set oNXStream = nothing
on error resume next set oNXStream = nx_.trace.reinit(oRootTraceStream) on error goto 0
if not oNXStream is nothing then dim oPrevTraceStream : set oPrevTraceStream = doc_.createstreamobj() oPrevTraceStream.attach oNXStream oPrevTraceStream.rewind
dim oXMLResultStream : set oXMLResultStream = doc_.createstreamobj()
doc_.parsexml nx_.nxtrace2page(oXMLResultStream,0,0), oPrevTraceStream
dim pPage : set pPage = doc_.getpagehli(asp_form_hli(20219,doc_.createhli(),oXMLResultStream)) pPage.domodalauto() end if
end if end sub
private function set_timer doc_.timer 213,"varFunction='unbold_old_msgs' vn5040=4",5 end function
private function kill_timer doc_.timer 213,"",0 end function
function fclose() : fclose=false kill_timer end function
private function unbold_tablesection(byref pSection) dim pRow for each pRow in pSection dim pCell for each pCell in pRow dim pElement for each pElement in pCell pElement.fontsize = 3 pElement.forecolor = rgb(80,80,80) next next pRow.backcolor = rgb(192,192,192) pRow.backcolor2 = rgb(224,224,224) next end function
function unbold_old_msgs 'odtłuść wszystkie istniejące komórki unbold_tablesection page_.ctrl(CTRLID_MSGTABLE).body kill_timer end function
function on_new_error_internal(nErrorCode,nIdHelp,strDesc) dim bImportant : bImportant = ((clng(nErrorCode) >= ENGINE_ERROR_FIRST and clng(nErrorCode) < APP_WARNING_FIRST) or _ clng(nErrorCode) > APP_WARNING_LAST)
dim pBody: set pBody = page_.ctrl(CTRLID_MSGTABLE).body
'dodaj nowy wiersz dim pRow : set pRow = pBody.insertnewrow(1)
dim pCellErrNr dim pCellErrMsg
set pCellErrMsg=pRow.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLECELL,-1) set pCellErrNr=pRow.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLECELL,-1)
'........................................................... 'komórka z kodem błędu '........................................................... pCellErrNr.width=clng( MINIMIZE_SIZE ) pCellErrNr.align = 1
dim pStaticErrNr set pStaticErrNr=pCellErrNr.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_STATIC, -1)
pStaticErrNr.text=CStr(nErrorCode) pStaticErrNr.fontsize = 3
if bImportant then pStaticErrNr.forecolor = rgb(255,0,0) end if
'........................................................... 'Komórka z opisem błędu '........................................................... dim pStaticErrMsg set pStaticErrMsg=pCellErrMsg.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_STATICEX, -1)
pStaticErrMsg.text=CStr( strDesc ) pStaticErrMsg.width=clng( MAXIMIZE_SIZE ) pStaticErrMsg.fontsize = 3 pCellErrMsg.parent.backcolor = rgb(255,255,128)
if bImportant then pStaticErrMsg.forecolor = rgb(255,0,0) end if
if nIdHelp <> 0 then set pStaticErrMsg.hli = doc_.createhlistr("vn1001=1030 vn1002=" + CStr(nIdHelp)) end if
if bImportant then ' page_.activate end if
end function
function on_new_error(byref pErrorHLI) 'retrieve info from hyperlink - internal contract dim bNXTrace : bNXTrace = false dim nErrorCode : nErrorCode = pErrorHLI.prop(5000) if nErrorCode = 7 then bNXTrace = true end if dim nIdHelp : nIdHelp = pErrorHLI.prop(5001) dim strDesc : strDesc = pErrorHLI.prop(5002) on_new_error_internal nErrorCode,nIdHelp,strDesc
dim pBody: set pBody = page_.ctrl(CTRLID_MSGTABLE).body 'usuń nadmiarowe elementy do while pBody.count > MAX_MESSAGES_ON_PAGE pBody.remove pBody.row( MAX_MESSAGES_ON_PAGE + 1 ).ident loop
kill_timer set_timer
if bNXTrace then display_nx_trace page_.goback end if end function
